name: AsqScreeningResult
title: ASQ Screening Result (local)
description: Three-tier risk stratification derived from ASQ responses. Local code system used pending investigation of whether LOINC 93374-7 (Suicide risk level) has associated answer concepts that would subsume this binding.

concept.definition: No to all Q1–Q4. No intervention required on this screen alone.
Yes to any Q1–Q4 and No to Q5. Potential risk identified — brief suicide safety assessment indicated.
Yes to any Q1–Q4 and Yes to Q5. Imminent risk — STAT safety evaluation required.
